title: Google | Google TV
summary: Google asked us to launch a new product for cord-cutters: Google TV, the platform that would later become Chromecast and overtake Apple TV in market share.
body: Google asked us to introduce Google TV, a new platform built for the cord-cutting wave. The launch piece centered on a single family's evening to show what the product unlocks at home: search across every service, voice control, and apps living next to live TV. The platform went on to become what we know today as Chromecast, eventually overtaking Apple TV in market share.
